summary.intent: Fix a bug where the agent loop's auto-continue logic was replacing long substantive final answers with terse summaries, then address PR review comments.
summary.outcome: PR #634 merged (closes #628) with a gated auto-continue check (`is_substantive_answer_text()`, ≥40 chars) and a reworded nudge prompt; two Greptile style comments resolved in a follow-up commit.

repo: Auto-continue logic lives in `crates/agents/src/runner.rs` and applies to both `run_agent_loop` and `run_agent_loop_streaming` branches.
CLAUDE.md mandates `#[must_use]` on pure predicate functions like `is_substantive_answer_text`.
`moltis-csq` has a pre-existing llama-cpp-sys-2 CUDA build failure on macOS that blocks `just lint` and `just test` locally — CI is the fallback for full workspace checks.
Beads issue tracking uses `bd close <issue-id> --reason` CLI; issue ID format is alphanumeric (e.g. `moltis-t1a`).
PR review bot is Greptile, raising style-level (P2) comments.

code.finding: New helper `is_substantive_answer_text()` (threshold: ≥40 trimmed chars) gates both non-streaming and streaming auto-continue branches to prevent overwriting long final answers.
`AUTO_CONTINUE_NUDGE` prompt rewording: removed 'restate or shorten' language, now instructs model to 'continue executing' or 'reply with exactly: done'.

workflow: Greptile PR comments are accessible via `gh api repos/<org>/<repo>/pulls/<number>/comments` (not `gh pr view --comments`).
Formatting and clippy scoped to affected crates (`-p moltis-agents`) is sufficient for PR validation when workspace build is broken on macOS.
Test suite for `moltis-agents` runs 294 tests; targeted runner tests can be isolated with `--lib -- runner::tests::test_auto_continue runner::tests::test_is_substantive`.

friction: Pre-existing llama-cpp-sys-2 CUDA build failure in `moltis-csq` blocks `just lint` and `just test` on macOS, forcing reliance on CI for full workspace validation.
open_items: `just lint` and `just test` (full workspace) deferred to CI due to macOS CUDA build failure in `moltis-csq`.
Manual QA steps (regression check with real Sonnet 4.6 session and Hevy training-volume flow) were documented but not confirmed completed in the transcript.
